scenario: Header shows active plot id
precondition: T3 mode; project loaded with ≥2 plots in different sub-tabs
action: Switch to a plot sub-tab
expected_result: Right sidebar header reads 'My Adjustments — <plot_id>' where plot_id matches the active sub-tab. Header should be bold and visually prominent (yellow background once implemented).

scenario: Empty state message per plot
precondition: T3 mode; no audit nodes yet added
action: Switch between plot sub-tabs
expected_result: Each plot shows 'No T3 adjustments for <plot_id> yet.' — not a blank panel.

scenario: Node scoped to This plot only stays on that plot
precondition: T3 mode; ≥2 plots open
action: Add a filter on Plot A → propagation modal → pick 'This plot only' → confirm → click Apply
expected_result: Node appears in Plot A's right sidebar. Switch to Plot B — node is NOT visible. Switch back to Plot A — node reappears.

scenario: Node scoped to All plots appears everywhere
precondition: T3 mode; ≥2 plots open
action: Add a filter → modal → pick 'All plots' → confirm → Apply
expected_result: Node visible in every plot's right sidebar panel. Switching plots all show the same node.

scenario: All plots except — excluded plot has no node
precondition: T3 mode; ≥3 plots open (e.g. QC plot + 2 analysis plots)
action: Add a filter → modal → pick 'All plots except…' → select QC plot in the multiselect → confirm → Apply
expected_result: QC plot has NO node for this filter. All other plots DO have the node.

scenario: Column presence shown before confirm
precondition: T3 mode; a column that exists in some plots but not all; ≥2 plots open
action: Add a filter on that column → open modal
expected_result: Modal shows per-plot column preview BEFORE confirming: ✅ apply / ⚠️ skip (col missing) / ❓ unknown per plot.

scenario: Skipped plots reported in notification
precondition: T3 mode; filter on a column that does NOT exist in one of the target plots; propagate 'All plots'
action: Confirm modal
expected_result: Notification mentions skipped plot(s): 'Skipped (column not in plot data): <plot_id>'. The skipped plot gets no pending node.

scenario: Drop non-key column adds drop_column node
precondition: T3 mode; data preview visible; a non-PK column is visible in the column selector
action: Deselect a non-PK column; click '➜ Audit drops (1)'
expected_result: Propagation modal opens. Header: 'Drop 1 column(s) — choose scope'. No PK warning. Pick 'This plot only' → confirm. Node with icon ✂️ appears in right sidebar.

scenario: Drop PK column is BLOCKED
precondition: T3 mode; data preview visible; primary key column visible in column selector
action: Deselect the primary key column (e.g. sample_id); click '➜ Audit drops (N)'
expected_result: Red error notification: 'Cannot drop join key column(s): sample_id. Use a row filter or row exclusion instead.' No audit node added.

scenario: Dropped column disappears from selector after Apply
precondition: T3 mode; drop a non-PK column node committed (via Apply)
action: Check the column selector in data preview
expected_result: Dropped column is absent from the column selector choices — you cannot re-drop it. The column is also absent from the data preview table.

scenario: Apply button locked without reason
precondition: T3 mode; pending node in right sidebar with empty reason field
action: Look at the Apply button label — do NOT type a reason yet
expected_result: Apply button shows 'Apply ⛔' — locked. Cannot be clicked (or clicking does nothing / shows a warning).

scenario: Apply button unlocks after typing reason
precondition: T3 mode; pending node in right sidebar
action: Type a reason in the yellow input box
expected_result: Apply button transitions to 'Apply' (no ⛔). It becomes clickable.

scenario: Reason input stays stable while typing
precondition: T3 mode; pending node with yellow reason input
action: Type a long reason slowly — pause between characters
expected_result: Cursor does not jump. Input does not clear mid-typing. No focus loss. [This is regression R4 — was a known instability.]

scenario: Apply confirms with notification
precondition: T3 mode; pending node with reason filled
action: Click Apply
expected_result: Notification: '✅ T3 recipe applied — N node(s) across M plot stack(s).'

scenario: Applied filter affects plot and data preview
precondition: T3 mode; filter node applied
action: Look at the active plot and data preview table
expected_result: Plot data reflects the filter (rows removed). Data preview also filtered.

scenario: Delete from one plot deletes from all (propagated node)
precondition: T3 mode; a propagated node committed (e.g. 'All plots')
action: Switch to any plot; click 🗑 on the audit node
expected_result: Notification: '🗑 1 audit decision(s) deleted (N copy/copies across plots).' Switch to another plot — node is gone there too.

scenario: Switching to T2 does not clear T3 nodes
precondition: T3 mode; committed audit nodes present
action: Use tier toggle to switch to T2
expected_result: Right sidebar still shows committed T3 nodes (read-only in T2). Nodes are not erased.

scenario: Compare T2/T3 toggle holds state on plot switch
precondition: T3 mode; comparison toggle enabled
action: Enable Compare T2/T3 toggle. Switch to a different plot sub-tab.
expected_result: Compare mode remains active on the new plot. [NOTE: currently a known bug AUDIT-4 — toggle resets on plot switch. Mark FAIL until fixed.]

scenario: Cancel in propagation modal adds no node
precondition: T3 mode; filter row staged; modal open
action: Click Cancel in the propagation modal
expected_result: Modal closes. No pending node added. Pending filter row is still staged (not lost).

scenario: Audit button with 0 rows shows helpful message
precondition: T3 mode; NO pending filter rows (list is empty)
action: Click '➜ Audit (0)' button (if clickable)
expected_result: Notification asks user to add filter rows first. OR button is disabled when count is 0 (either is acceptable).

scenario: Two filters on same column → separate nodes
precondition: T3 mode
action: Add two different filters on the same column (e.g. year > 2020 AND year < 2025). Send both to audit as 'This plot only'.
expected_result: Two separate pending nodes appear in right sidebar for the same column. Both are independent (can be deleted separately).
